note: Hand-entered seattle one-off events (curated holiday programming, etc.). Stable id, real lat/lon, ISO local startDateTime/endDateTime with the local offset. Past events are filtered automatically.

events.title: Seafair 4th of July 2026: Lake Union Fireworks at Gas Works Park, Seattle
events.description: Ring in July 4th, 2026 at Seattle's Seafair 4th of July, the free all-day celebration at Gas Works Park overlooking Lake Union. Families can enjoy live music, food, and All-American games before a fully choreographed fireworks show lights up the night around 10:15 p.m. Free and open to the public.

events.title: Bellevue Family 4th 2026: Free Fireworks Festival at Downtown Park
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day at the Bellevue Family 4th 2026, the Eastside's largest free July 4th festival at Downtown Park. Enjoy live music, family activities, and food vendors leading up to a dazzling fireworks display synchronized to music at 10:05 p.m.

events.title: Bothell Fourth of July 2026 Parade & Pancake Breakfast
events.description: Bothell's hometown Fourth of July 2026 returns to downtown with a free family celebration. Start with the Fire Department's pancake breakfast at Park at Bothell Landing, cheer on the Children's Parade, then enjoy the Grand Parade marching down Main Street at noon.
events.venue: Park at Bothell Landing / Main Street

events.title: Burien Independence Day Parade 2026: Free July 4th Family Celebration
events.description: Join thousands for Burien's 104th annual Independence Day Parade on July 4th, 2026. This free, beloved community tradition marches through downtown Burien at 11 a.m. with floats, marching bands, and family fun for all ages.

events.title: Puyallup Red, White & Kaboom 2026: July 3rd Fireworks Festival
events.description: Puyallup's Red, White & Kaboom 2026 lights up the Washington State Fair Event Center on July 3rd. This family festival features live music, food trucks, a 5K race, and a fun-filled kids' corner, capped by a professional fireworks display at 10 p.m. to kick off the July 4th weekend.

events.title: Celebrate Kirkland 2026: Free Fourth of July Parade at Marina Park
events.description: Celebrate Kirkland 2026 brings a free, all-American Fourth of July parade to downtown Kirkland's Marina Park. Families can enjoy kids' decorating activities at 10:30 a.m., a Kids Parade at 11:30 a.m., and the main July 4th parade through the waterfront business district.

events.title: Renton's Fabulous 4th of July 2026: Free Fireworks at Gene Coulon Park
events.description: Renton's Fabulous 4th of July 2026 returns to Gene Coulon Memorial Beach Park on Lake Washington. This free, family festival features a free KidZone with inflatables and face-painting, live stage entertainment, and a fireworks display launched over the water at 10 p.m.
